commit_scope: Make native /api/health a pure liveness response

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/language-model.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/codec.fk form-stdlib/structured-codec.fk form-stdlib/json-codec.fk form-stdlib/tests/json-emitter-band.fk
local_validation.notes: After PR #2892 deployed, a delayed public CORS window still observed 4 native /api/health fatal responses in 80 attempts. Local BML /api/health remained 80/80 stable with this patch. The native liveness response preserves status, version, timestamps, deployed_sha, schema_ok, integrity_compromised, smart_reap_available, recent_outcomes, and kernel_runtime keys, but no longer performs DB integrity/schema/recent-outcomes or filesystem smart-reap checks inside /api/health. Persistence proof remains on /api/health/persistence and /api/ready.

ci_validation.notes: PR CI has not run yet for this branch.

commands: Hostinger Auto Deploy on main after merge
deploy_validation.notes: Deploy proof should show repeated native /api/health CORS probes return 200 without X-Form-Fatal-Kind, and public verifier should pass API/web/CORS checks.

phase_gate.reason: Local validation passed; PR CI and deploy proof remain pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Native /api/health should be a crash-resistant liveness endpoint that returns a complete health JSON envelope without invoking production DB/cache/filesystem checks that can fail intermittently.
test_flows: Probe /api/health repeatedly with Origin: https://coherencycoin.com and verify HTTP 200 plus Access-Control-Allow-Origin.
Run the public deploy verifier and confirm API runtime SHA parity, promoted BML reads, web health proxy parity, and CORS pass.
